use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with sliding animation feedback
Navigation triggers with interactive hover states
Form submission buttons with visual confirmation effects
Icon buttons with sliding label reveals on hover
Multi-variant button system for different UI contexts
ai_summary: A reusable slide button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options using class-variance-authority. Built on Radix UI Slot for flexible composition, featuring smooth sliding animations on interaction for enhanced user feedback. Part of the reuno-ui design system.
